description: Copy one of the blocks below into your MCP client configuration (e.g. .vscode/mcp.json, claude_desktop_config.json, etc.).

nuget_installed.description: Use this after installing ETLReader as a global .NET tool: dotnet tool install -g ETLReader

local_dev.description: Use this when running from a local clone of the repository. Replace the path with the absolute path to your ETLReader/src directory.
